title: Cintas Corporation Announces Webcast for Fourth Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Results
text: CINCINNATI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) today announced that it will release fiscal year 2023 fourth quarter financial results on Thursday, July 13, 2023, before the market opens. The Company will conduct a conference call to address the financial results. A live webcast of the call will be available to individual investors and the public beginning at 10:00 a.m., Eastern Time, on Thursday, July 13, 2023. The webcast will be available at www.Cintas.com. Click on the webcas.

title: Using Return On Capital Employed To Generate Alpha With Dividend Aristocrats
text: Return on Capital Employed (ROCE) is a financial ratio that measures a company's profitability and efficiency in utilizing its capital to generate returns. Strategies that focus on investing in companies with high ROCE or significant improvements in ROCE have historically outperformed the overall market. ROCE should be incorporated into stock research as it is an important metric for evaluating the long-term performance of a business.

title: Cintas Canada Announces Finalists for 2023 Canada's Best Restroom Contest
text: MISSISSAUGA, Ontario--(BUSINESS WIRE)--On your marks, get set, vote! Cintas Canada, Ltd. invites the public to vote for their favourite washroom for the 2023 Canada's Best Restroom contest. The public can vote multiple times now through July 7, 2023 at bestrestroom.com/Canada. The winner will receive $2,500 in facility services from Cintas to help maintain their award-winning washrooms.
